signals.evidence: Bihag on Avoma validation call: 'I have to postpone my project for a while' — shared frozen IT roadmap, no new date
Next_Step: 'No budget for S2P in 26 ... SGD to be sold this year or 27 by PAI Partners'; confidence dropped to 10%
CLM awarded to unnamed niche vendor on price/AI fit; Bihag 29 Jan: 'with the gap of price today ... it's not gonna be you'
Bihag: 'I would like to wait for the decision in this year budget. Let's keep in touch.'
Pierre: 'check whether we could restart our discussions in September or October' — no reply logged
ForecastCategory Best Case->Pipeline; CloseDate 2026-06-24->2027-03-17 (placeholder); amount earlier cut 190k->150k
Next_Step: 'Ask Bihag if he will ask for approval of this project again in September' — champion engaged but blocked by budget/PE

top_rationale: The S2P project has been on indefinite hold since the 27 Feb 2026 validation call, where Bihag Shah postponed and showed SGD's frozen IT roadmap with no new date.

FY26 budget was withdrawn (14 Apr) after the Contract Management rollout ran late and because PE owner PAI Partners may sell SGD; forecast was cut to Pipeline and close pushed to a Mar-2027 placeholder.
Zycus lost the CLM module to an unnamed niche vendor (Feb 2026) on price plus a marginally better AI/integration fit, per Bihag's own account on the 29 Jan negotiation call.
Champion Bihag Shah is still engaged (replied 27 May, 'let's keep in touch, waiting on this year's budget') and plans to re-request FY27 budget in September, but no dated commitment exists.
No buyer meeting in ~4.5 months; recent cadence is rep-initiated (22 May, 1 Jul) drawing only polite deferrals; there is no scheduled future milestone anywhere.

Deep technical/legal validation (SAP + Salesforce integration, DR/security, on-site workshops) was completed in Jan 2026 — the solution is de-risked, but nothing advances until budget authority returns.

drivers: ⚠️ Project postponed indefinitely since 27 Feb 2026; FY26 budget withdrawn, no confirmed FY27 date, ~132d since the last buyer meeting. ► Get Bihag to commit a dated September FY27 budget-review checkpoint and a joint calendar hold.
⚠️ 'Vendor Selected' but no S2P award and no paper — MSA/OF/SOW were drafted in late Jan then never executed. ► Correct the system of record and rebuild the paper path the moment budget clears.

⚠️ CLM module lost to a niche vendor on price + AI/integration fit (Feb 2026); Legal (Valérie) sponsors the rival. ► Reposition the surviving S2P scope (sourcing, eProc, supplier onboarding, iRisk, Merlin) as a purchasing-led award insulated from Legal's CLM choice.

⚠️ Forecast cut Best Case→Pipeline, amount 190k→150k, close pushed ~9 months; PE owner PAI Partners may sell SGD — an existential freeze risk. ► Map the PAI sale timeline and identify who controls capex during the LBO.
✅ Bihag Shah is a proven champion who fought internally to keep Zycus in the full-suite race and kept us informed through the freeze rather than going dark.
✅ Deep multi-threaded technical and legal validation completed (SAP on-prem + Salesforce integration, DR/RTO-RPO, security, workshops) — solution risk is largely retired for a restart.
win.focus_now: Convert Bihag's vague September re-ask into a dated, budgeted FY27 checkpoint and establish whether the PAI Partners sale freezes or funds S2P — nothing advances until budget authority is clear.
win.ceiling_applied: §5.5 stage-reality STALL override — capped DOWN from the Vendor Selected anchor (72) to the deal's true stalled/unawarded state; §5.2 forecast-conviction ceiling (Pipeline → ≤80) also binds.
win.exception_statement: Recorded 'Vendor Selected' (anchor 72) OVER-positions this deal: there is no buyer-voiced S2P award, no MSA/OF/SOW executed, the CLM module was lost to a niche rival (Feb 2026), the project has been postponed indefinitely since the 27 Feb 2026 validation call (~132d dark), forecast was cut to Pipeline, amount reduced and close pushed ~9 months, and the PE owner (PAI Partners) may sell SGD. Scored against the true state — a stalled, unawarded deal held up only by an intact champion and completed validation — not the recorded stage. ► Seller nudge: move the stage back / correct the forecast + close in Salesforce so the record reflects the freeze.

drivers: ✅ Champion intact and slowdown explained: Bihag replied 27 May ('let's keep in touch, waiting on this year's budget') and plans a September FY27 re-ask — this is a budget freeze, not a ghosting.
⚠️ No buyer meeting since the 27 Feb validation call (~4.5 months) and no genuine deal advance since. ► Lock a September FY27 budget-review session with Bihag now to create the next dated milestone.
⚠️ No dated future milestone or scheduled session anywhere on the calendar. ► Convert the vague 'September re-ask' into a specific dated checkpoint with Bihag + Fiona.
⚠️ Forecast cut Best Case→Pipeline and close pushed ~9 months to a Mar-2027 placeholder. ► Set an honest close tied to the FY27 budget cycle rather than a placeholder.

⚠️ Recent cadence is entirely rep-initiated (22 May invite, 1 Jul summer note) drawing only deferrals. ► Give Bihag a concrete reason to re-engage before September (ROI refresh, French reference, PAI-focused case).
⚠️ PE owner PAI Partners may sell SGD, which could freeze all capex. ► Diagnose the sale timeline and its impact on S2P funding.
mom.focus_now: Turn Bihag's September re-ask into a firm, dated FY27 budget checkpoint — that single scheduled milestone is what restarts momentum.

prospect_requirements.item: Confirm with Bihag the September FY27 budget re-approval timing he asked us to re-check, and whether the PAI Partners sale changes it
Hold ready the dual pricing (full S2P-suite vs CLM-only) as a 3-year fixed-price with progressive user activation, per Bihag/Fiona's asks, for the budget restart

zycus_commitments.item: Re-open discussions with Bihag in September/October as Pierre committed in the pre-summer note
zycus_commitments.grounding_quote: I also wanted to check whether you think we could restart our discussions in September or October.

waiting_on_buyer.item: FY27 budget approval for S2P (the gating dependency) from the CFO and PE owner
Bihag to confirm whether the PAI Partners sale of SGD proceeds and its impact on the S2P project

best_practices.item: Reposition the surviving S2P scope (sourcing, eProc, supplier onboarding, iRisk, Merlin Intake) as a purchasing-led award insulated from Legal's CLM decision — rebuild the differentiation/credibility case vs the incumbent CLM rival
best_practices.rank_reason: Buyer doubt about Zycus vs competition (Legal chose a rival on AI/integration/price) — highest precedence, an active deal-killer

best_practices.item: Multi-thread beyond the blocked champion: re-engage CFO Philippe (EB) and identify/map the PAI Partners capex decision-maker
best_practices.rank_reason: Single-threaded on a champion who is currently powerless; EB disengaged since Jan 2026 on a frozen deal

best_practices.item: Refresh a quantified, buyer-owned business case (ROI) tied to FY27 budget justification to arm Bihag for the September re-ask
best_practices.rank_reason: MEDDPICC metrics gap — pain is documented but never converted to a buyer-owned dollar figure

best_practices.item: Run a keep-warm reference cadence (French customer on iContract with SFDC connector) to sustain credibility through the freeze
best_practices.rank_reason: Sustain preference during dormancy so Zycus stays front-runner when budget returns

sum.headline: No change in the last 24h.
sum.as_of_note: Deal on indefinite hold since the 27 Feb 2026 postponement; Pierre's 1 Jul 'before summer break' note to Bihag (restart in Sep/Oct?) is still awaiting a reply — a rep-only email into silence, not a change.
